data.title: Fat Prophets Announces Cessation of Securities
data.description:
Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd. ( (AU:FPC) ) has issued an update.

Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd announced the cessation of 1,063,580 ordinary fully paid securities due to an on-market buy-back. This move is part of the company’s capital management strategy, potentially impacting its market positioning by reducing the number of shares outstanding, which could influence shareholder value and market perception.

More about Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd.

Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd operates in the financial services industry, focusing on investment management. The company primarily offers investment products and services, catering to a global market with a contrarian investment strategy.

data.title: Gorilla Gold Mines Updates on Mulwarrie Drilling Project
data.description:
Labyrinth Resources Limited ( (AU:GG8) ) has issued an announcement.

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd has provided an update on its Mulwarrie Drilling Project, highlighting the presence of quartz veining with associated sulphides in one of its drill holes, MWEX012. While assay results are pending, the company cautions against using visual estimates as a substitute for laboratory analyses, emphasizing the importance of accurate data for economic evaluations. The announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and adherence to industry standards, as it awaits further data to inform its exploration strategy.

More about Labyrinth Resources Limited

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold resources. The company is involved in projects that aim to discover and extract gold deposits, with a market focus on enhancing its resource base and increasing its production capabilities.

Average Trading Volume: 1,088,498

Current Market Cap: A$279M

data.title: StrongPoint ASA Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
StrongPoint ASA ( (DE:PGT) ) has provided an update.

StrongPoint ASA has announced the call for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, which will be held as an audiocast on April 29. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s future plans and operational strategies, reinforcing StrongPoint’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.

More about StrongPoint ASA

StrongPoint is a grocery retail technology company headquartered in Norway, providing solutions to enhance shopping experiences and improve the efficiency of online grocery shopping. The company operates in over 20 countries, offering end-to-end e-commerce solutions and a range of in-store technologies. StrongPoint is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and has a revenue of approximately NOK 1.3 billion.

data.title: Yaskawa Electric Reports Mixed Financial Results for FY 2025
data.description:
An announcement from Yaskawa Electric ( (JP:6506) ) is now available.

Yaskawa Electric reported a decrease in revenue and operating profit for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2025, with revenue down by 6.6% and operating profit dropping by 24.3%. Despite these declines, the company saw an increase in profit before tax and profit attributable to owners of the parent, indicating some resilience in its financial performance. Looking ahead, Yaskawa plans to increase revenue and operating profit in the next fiscal year by capitalizing on recovering market demand and optimizing production and sales. However, a decrease in profit before tax and earnings per share is expected due to the absence of previous gains from share transfers.

More about Yaskawa Electric

Yaskawa Electric Corporation is a prominent player in the industrial automation industry, specializing in the production of motion control systems, robotics, and system engineering. The company is listed on the Tokyo and Fukuoka stock exchanges and is known for its innovative solutions in automation technology.

data.title: State Street Corporation Becomes Substantial Holder in Collins Foods
data.description:
Collins Foods Limited ( (AU:CKF) ) has issued an announcement.

Collins Foods Limited has announced a significant change in its shareholder structure, with State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries becoming substantial holders. This development reflects a shift in the voting power dynamics within the company, as State Street now has the power to control the exercise of voting rights attached to a significant number of shares. This change could potentially influence the company’s strategic decisions and impact its operations, given State Street’s role as an investment manager and trustee.

More about Collins Foods Limited

data.title: Grieg Seafood Reports Q1 2025 Harvest Volume
data.description:
An update from Grieg Seafood ASA ( (GRGSF) ) is now available.

Grieg Seafood ASA reported a harvest volume of approximately 20,800 tonnes GWT for the first quarter of 2025, with significant contributions from its regions in Norway and Canada. The announcement highlights the company’s ongoing operations and market presence, with expectations of continued activity in the upcoming quarters, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about Grieg Seafood ASA

Grieg Seafood ASA is a leading global salmon farming company with operations in Rogaland and Finnmark in Norway, and in British Columbia and Newfoundland in Canada. Headquartered in Bergen, Norway, the company is committed to sustainable farming practices, aiming to minimize environmental impact and ensure optimal fish welfare. Grieg Seafood ASA has been listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange since June 2007.

data.title: Bertrandt AG Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Bertrandt ( (DE:BDT) ) has provided an announcement.

Bertrandt AG has announced a change in voting rights, with Union Investment Privatfonds GmbH adjusting its shareholding to 5.03% of the total voting rights as of March 31, 2025. This adjustment reflects a slight decrease from the previous notification, potentially impacting the company’s shareholder structure and influencing its strategic decisions.

More about Bertrandt

Bertrandt AG is a company based in Ehningen, Germany, and is involved in the engineering services industry. The company is listed on various stock exchanges, including the regulated market in Frankfurt and the free market in Berlin, Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Munich, Stuttgart, and Tradegate.

data.title: Marumae Co., Ltd. Alters Financial Disclosure Strategy for Long-term Focus
data.description:
Marumae Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6264) ) has issued an update.

Marumae Co., Ltd. announced a strategic shift in its financial disclosures by discontinuing the quarterly reporting of order intake and backlog. This decision is aimed at aligning with the company’s focus on medium- to long-term business value rather than short-term fluctuations, which may impact stakeholders by providing a more stable and long-term perspective on the company’s performance.

More about Marumae Co., Ltd.

Marumae Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer specializing in vacuum components used in the production of semiconductors and flat panel displays (FPD). The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and focuses on providing technology solutions for the future.
